name: shipshapeshop
description: Ship Shape Shop — a gacha + idle game of mathematical shapes. Monorepo root (convenience scripts).

scripts.setup: pnpm run build:core && pnpm -C web install
scripts.build: pnpm run build:core:release && pnpm -C web build
scripts.test: cargo test --manifest-path core/Cargo.toml && pnpm -C web test
scripts.screenshots: pnpm run build && pnpm -C web run screenshots
